# Confidence dynamics (auto-generated)
- Runs: **720** | Max turns: **11**
- Plots directory: `outputs/analysis/confidence_dynamics`
- ![trajectory](trajectory_mean_std_by_model_strategy.png) — mean ± std per turn.
- Per-model trajectories split by **final** correctness (files `trajectory_by_final_outcome__*.png`).
- ![reliability](reliability_grid_model_x_strategy.png) — calibration-style bins (10-point wide).
- ![flip delta](delta_conf_on_answer_flip.png) — how confidence moves when answers change.
- ![flip delta by pair](mean_delta_conf_on_flip_by_model_strategy.png)
- ![volatility](within_run_conf_std_by_model_strategy.png) — average spread of confidence inside a run.
- ![aligned](confidence_aligned_first_flip.png) — ±5 turns around first letter change.
